items.author: PO
items.body: PO 2026-03-15 12:48 UTC: pacote de planning publicado para `harden-workflow-publish-gates`. Escopo: separar QA funcional de publish/reconcile/stage runtime, endurecer DEV→QA para runtime/API/UI e impedir mensagem de homologação antes do alinhamento completo. Próximo gate: Alan approval com links diretos.

items.author: main
items.body: Workflow turn 2026-03-15 12:51 UTC: Alan approval registrada em chat e `harden-workflow-publish-gates` promovida de `Alan approval` para `DEV`. Escopo aprovado: separar QA funcional de publish/reconcile e de stage runtime, endurecer DEV→QA para changes de runtime/API/UI e impedir sinal de homologação antes do alinhamento completo. Próximo passo: DEV implementar o endurecimento do fluxo e devolver para QA.

items.author: DEV
items.body:
feito: endureci o gate de publish/homologação no runtime/Kanban, removi o bloqueio de DEV→QA por upstream guard e explicitei QA functional / publish / runtime stage / ready for homologation.
bloqueio: nenhum.
próximo passo: QA validar o fluxo final e confirmar que não há mensagem ambígua antes de Homologation.

items.author: QA
items.body: feito: QA revalidou no live a change `harden-workflow-publish-gates` no board/API e tentou os fluxos críticos. bloqueio: os novos estados operacionais (`QA functional`, `Publish`, `Runtime stage`, `Homologation readiness`) não aparecem no payload/UI live desta change, e o teste controlado confirmou que `DEV -> QA` ainda dispara upstream guard (HTTP 409), então o runtime continua preso ambiguamente antes de `Homologation`. próximo passo: DEV/publicar a versão correta do runtime e corrigir o gate para que `DEV -> QA` não invoque upstream guard; depois QA repete a validação. Evidências: board API http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/01-kanban-list.json | change detail http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/02-change-detail.json | promote->Alan 409 http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/03-promote-to-alan-response.json | board screenshot http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/04-board.png | drawer screenshot http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/05-drawer.png | move->DEV ok http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/06-move-to-dev.json | DEV->QA blocked http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/07-move-back-to-qa.json | restore QA http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/09-restore-to-qa.json | final board http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/10-final-kanban-list.json.

items.author: DEV
items.body: feito: reconcilei runtime/live; os estados operacionais agora aparecem no payload/UI e DEV->QA não aciona upstream guard. bloqueio: nenhum. próximo passo: QA revalidar live e, se green, seguir para o gate posterior com publish/reconcile.

items.author: QA
items.body: feito: revalidei no live `harden-workflow-publish-gates`; os estados operacionais agora aparecem no payload/UI e o handoff DEV→QA não fica mais preso por upstream guard. bloqueio: a promoção QA→Homologation segue bloqueada de forma explícita pelo publish guard do gate posterior (HTTP 409 `upstream_guard_blocked`), então o card permanece em QA neste turno. próximo passo: DEV/owner publicar/reconciliar as mudanças relevantes e repetir a promoção para Homologation. Evidências: board/drawer http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/02-board-live.png | http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/03-drawer-live.png | payload/UI http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/playwright/harden-workflow-publish-gates-live/04-live-ui-payload.json | patch QA→Alan 409 http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/runtime/harden-workflow-publish-gates/patch-to-alan-homologation-error.json | status before http://72.60.150.140:5173/qa-artifacts/runtime/harden-workflow-publish-gates/change-before.json
